mapper.select: SELECT NEXT VALUE FOR pi_er2_connect_hist_seq FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_ER2_CONNECT_HIST ( ID, RECON_ID, URL, METHOD, REQ_DATA, SND_DTM ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{recon_id}, #{url}, #{method}, #{req_data}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') )
mapper.select: SELECT SCHEDULE_ID, SM.RECON_ID, SM.START_TIME, SM.PAUSE_TIME, (CASE WHEN SM.START_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H') THEN '01' WHEN SM.PAUSE_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H') THEN '02' END ) AS FLAG, AP_NO FROM pi_schedule_management SM WHERE SM.active_status = '00' AND SM.week_day = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%a') AND (SM.START_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H') OR SM.PAUSE_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H') )
SELECT SCHEDULE_ID, STOP_DTM FROM pi_scan_schedule WHERE 1=1 AND WORK_CD = '03' AND ACTIVE_STATUS = '00' AND STOP_DTM = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE PI_SCAN_SCHEDULE SET ACTIVE_STATUS = '01' ,UPT_USER_NO = 'cronTab' ,UPT_DTM = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') WHERE 1=1 AND SCHEDULE_ID = #{value} AND ACTIVE_STATUS REGEXP '00|02'
